title: Get Movin'
subtitle: Movement phase: disembark, move modes & the confirm gate

bullets: Click a unit's [Embarked] row to get da boyz out of a transport — place each base inside da glowin' ring.
Movement modes: pick da radio, den [b]Confirm Movement Mode[/b] — it don't stick till ya confirm.
Drag models (or carry 'em wiv da pad), [b]Undo Model[/b] / [b]Reset Unit[/b] fix mistakes.
[b]End This Unit's Move[/b] locks one unit. Da big red button ends da whole phase.

prompt.text: Every unit can move once a turn. Pick 'em from da unit list on da right — we'll get da Boyz out of da wagon first.

prompt.kbm: Click da [b]Boyz + Warboss [Embarked][/b] row in da list, den click [b]OK[/b] to start da disembark.
prompt.pad: Glide {ls} onto da [b]Boyz + Warboss [Embarked][/b] row, press {a}, den {a} again on da dialog.

hint.text: It's da row wiv [Embarked in Battlewagon] on it.

prompt.kbm: Click a spot inside da glowin' ring for [b]each[/b] model — keep 'em close together an' not on top of each uvver. Da move locks in after da last one.
prompt.pad: Glide {ls} to a spot inside da ring an' press {a} for [b]each[/b] model — keep 'em close, not stacked.

hint.text: Right-click cancels if ya get stuck — den click da row again. Every base needs to be wivin 3" of da wagon.

prompt.kbm: Now da wagon: click [b]Battlewagon[/b] in da list, pick da [b]Advance[/b] radio, den hit [b]Confirm Movement Mode[/b] — da mode don't stick till ya confirm it!
prompt.pad: Tap {rb} till da [b]Battlewagon[/b]'s picked, glide onto [b]Advance[/b], {a}, den [b]Confirm Movement Mode[/b] an' {a}.

hint.text: Radio first, den da Confirm Movement Mode button under it. Da dice add to da wagon's move.

prompt.text: Advance adds a D6 to da move — an' when a roll's dis important, da game offers a [b]Command Re-roll[/b] (costs 1 CP). We're keepin' it: click [b]Keep Roll[/b].

hint.text: Keep Roll — save da CP for somefin' bigger.

prompt.kbm: Drag da wagon's hull forward an' drop it — da panel shows how many inches ya used.
prompt.pad: Press {a} on da wagon to grab it, glide {ls} where ya want it, {a} to drop.

hint.text: Grab da middle of da hull. [b]Undo Model[/b] takes da last drop back.

prompt.kbm: Happy? [b]End This Unit's Move[/b] locks da wagon in. ([b]Undo Model[/b] an' [b]Reset Unit[/b] are right next to it if ya ain't.)
prompt.pad: Glide onto [b]End This Unit's Move[/b] an' press {a}.

prompt.kbm: Da grots can stay put — units don't [i]have[/i] to move. Hit da big red button to end da Movement phase.
prompt.pad: Da grots can stay put. Press {menu} an' confirm to end da Movement phase.
